text.title: Fine-tune vs prompt economic model — decision tree

decision-tree.root-question: Production traffic exists AND monthly spend > $500 AND vendor pricing different for prompt vs FT?

branch.when: production_traffic == false OR monthly_spend < 500 OR vendor_lockstep == true
production_traffic == true AND monthly_spend >= 500 AND vendor_lockstep == false
branch.question: All four scenarios computed AND sensitivity table ≥3 rows AND ops_overhead > 0?

example.trace: 50k req/day, ops_overhead 400, 4 scenarios, sensitivity 3 rows, 3 favourable scenarios -> run-the-checklist (recommendation fine-tune)
